title: elaeagnus dendroidea
intro: Elaeagnus dendroidea, also known as silverberry or wolf-willow, is a deciduous shrub native to Eastern Asia, characterized by its silvery-gray foliage and small, fragrant flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Elaeagnus dendroidea include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support respiratory health. Elaeagnus dendroidea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal dosages.
